welcome.title: Welcome to BiBoTracking
welcome.sub: Choose how you want to use the app.

local.title: Just me
local.desc: Track locally on this device. No account — nothing leaves your machine.

account.title: I have an account
account.desc: Sign in to sync with your team or family workspace.

consent.title: What BiBoTracking captures
consent.subtitle: Four kinds of activity. You are always in control.

shots.d: Blurred thumbnails on an interval you set.

keys.d: Counts only — never the actual keys.

activity.d: Active app and how long you use it.

web.d: Domains visited — page contents stay private.

consent.whoLocal: Only you, on this device. Nothing is uploaded.
consent.whoTeam: Shared with your team or family workspace.
